name: gospider
title: gospider

commands.name: gospider

arguments.description: Header to use (Use multiple flag to set multiple header)
arguments.raw: -H, --header stringArray     Header to use (Use multiple flag to set multiple header)

arguments.description: Load headers and cookie from burp raw http request
arguments.raw: --burp string            Load headers and cookie from burp raw http request

arguments.description: Number of threads (Run sites in parallel) (default 1)
arguments.raw: -t, --threads int            Number of threads (Run sites in parallel) (default 1)

arguments.description: The number of the maximum allowed concurrent requests of the matching domains (default 5)
arguments.raw: -c, --concurrent int         The number of the maximum allowed concurrent requests of the matching domains (default 5)

arguments.description: MaxDepth limits the recursion depth of visited URLs. (Set it to 0 for infinite recursion) (default 1)
arguments.raw: -d, --depth int              MaxDepth limits the recursion depth of visited URLs. (Set it to 0 for infinite recursion) (default 1)

arguments.description: Delay is the duration to wait before creating a new request to the matching domains (second)
arguments.raw: -k, --delay int              Delay is the duration to wait before creating a new request to the matching domains (second)

arguments.description: RandomDelay is the extra randomized duration to wait added to Delay before creating a new request (second)
arguments.raw: -K, --random-delay int       RandomDelay is the extra randomized duration to wait added to Delay before creating a new request (second)

arguments.description: Find URLs from 3rd party (Archive.org, CommonCrawl.org, VirusTotal.com)
arguments.raw: -a, --other-source           Find URLs from 3rd party (Archive.org, CommonCrawl.org, VirusTotal.com)

arguments.description: Include subdomains crawled from 3rd party. Default is main domain
arguments.raw: -w, --include-subs           Include subdomains crawled from 3rd party. Default is main domain

arguments.description: Also include other-source's urls (still crawl and request)
arguments.raw: -r, --include-other-source   Also include other-source's urls (still crawl and request)

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# gospider -h
 A Simple Web Spider - v1.1.0 by @theblackturtle
 
 Usage:
 gospider [flags]
 
 Flags:
 -s, --site string            Site to crawl
 -S, --sites string           Site list to crawl
 -p, --proxy string           Proxy (Ex: http://127.0.0.1:8080)
 -o, --output string          Output folder
 -u, --user-agent string      User Agent to use
                              	web: random web user-agent
                              	mobi: random mobile user-agent
                              	or you can set your special user-agent (default "web")
     --cookie string          Cookie to use (testA=a; testB=b)
 -H, --header stringArray     Header to use (Use multiple flag to set multiple header)
     --burp string            Load headers and cookie from burp raw http request
     --blacklist string       Blacklist URL Regex
 -t, --threads int            Number of threads (Run sites in parallel) (default 1)
 -c, --concurrent int         The number of the maximum allowed concurrent requests of the matching domains (default 5)
 -d, --depth int              MaxDepth limits the recursion depth of visited URLs. (Set it to 0 for infinite recursion) (default 1)
 -k, --delay int              Delay is the duration to wait before creating a new request to the matching domains (second)
 -K, --random-delay int       RandomDelay is the extra randomized duration to wait added to Delay before creating a new request (second)
 -m, --timeout int            Request timeout (second) (default 10)
     --sitemap                Try to crawl sitemap.xml
     --robots                 Try to crawl robots.txt (default true)
 -a, --other-source           Find URLs from 3rd party (Archive.org, CommonCrawl.org, VirusTotal.com)
 -w, --include-subs           Include subdomains crawled from 3rd party. Default is main domain
 -r, --include-other-source   Also include other-source's urls (still crawl and request)
     --debug                  Turn on debug mode
 -v, --verbose                Turn on verbose
     --no-redirect            Disable redirect
     --version                Check version
 -h, --help                   help for gospider

local_help.--help:
A Simple Web Spider - v1.1.0 by @theblackturtle

Usage:
  gospider [flags]

Flags:
  -s, --site string            Site to crawl
  -S, --sites string           Site list to crawl
  -p, --proxy string           Proxy (Ex: http://127.0.0.1:8080)
  -o, --output string          Output folder
  -u, --user-agent string      User Agent to use
                               	web: random web user-agent
                               	mobi: random mobile user-agent
                               	or you can set your special user-agent (default "web")
      --cookie string          Cookie to use (testA=a; testB=b)
  -H, --header stringArray     Header to use (Use multiple flag to set multiple header)
      --burp string            Load headers and cookie from burp raw http request
      --blacklist string       Blacklist URL Regex
  -t, --threads int            Number of threads (Run sites in parallel) (default 1)
  -c, --concurrent int         The number of the maximum allowed concurrent requests of the matching domains (default 5)
  -d, --depth int              MaxDepth limits the recursion depth of visited URLs. (Set it to 0 for infinite recursion) (default 1)
  -k, --delay int              Delay is the duration to wait before creating a new request to the matching domains (second)
  -K, --random-delay int       RandomDelay is the extra randomized duration to wait added to Delay before creating a new request (second)
  -m, --timeout int            Request timeout (second) (default 10)
      --sitemap                Try to crawl sitemap.xml
      --robots                 Try to crawl robots.txt (default true)
  -a, --other-source           Find URLs from 3rd party (Archive.org, CommonCrawl.org, VirusTotal.com)
  -w, --include-subs           Include subdomains crawled from 3rd party. Default is main domain
  -r, --include-other-source   Also include other-source's urls (still crawl and request)
      --debug                  Turn on debug mode
  -v, --verbose                Turn on verbose
      --no-redirect            Disable redirect
      --version                Check version
  -h, --help                   help for gospider

binary_metadata.file_type: ELF 64-bit LSB executable, x86-64, version 1 (SYSV), dynamically linked, interpreter /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2, Go BuildID=TtmyTiSUlzDIfzkqj9qR/3ifMg7xqVsyXd0K_aKzg/NX-YqCfbZy2YArTUy7Zz/-iIozYJPgZPVxkD9sCvB, stripped

apt_metadata.description:
Fast web spider written in Go
This package contains a Fast web spider written in Go. The features are:
- Fast web crawling
- Brute force and parse sitemap.xml
- Parse robots.txt
- Generate and verify link from JavaScript files
- Link Finder
- Find AWS-S3 from response source
- Find subdomains from response source
- Get URLs from Wayback Machine, Common Crawl, Virus Total, Alien Vault
- Format output easy to Grep
- Support Burp input
- Crawl multiple sites in parallel
- Random mobile/web User-AgentShowcases

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use gospider because ### gospider.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair gospider with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `gospider --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### gospider.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install gospider
Install with: sudo apt install gospider
